offer: For law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, outdated compliance knowledge causes legal penalties. We provide regulatory tracking instead of manual tracking of regulatory changes.
problem: Staying compliant with constantly changing regulations
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking help

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
